# Third-party RTL

| File | Source | License |
|------|--------|---------|
| `cfar_ca.v` | [AERIS-10 / PLFM_RADAR](https://github.com/NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR) | [CERN-OHL-P v2](https://ohwr.org/cern_ohl_p_v2.txt) |

Bundled so [`hdl/radar_demo_tb.v`](../hdl/radar_demo_tb.v) simulates without cloning the full hardware repo.

**Redistribution:** preserve upstream notices per CERN-OHL-P.
